Description.en: Let arrows fly from afar. Kill them before they arrive.
Description.zh: 从远处倾泻箭矢，使敌人无暇近身便一命呜呼。

Description.en: Shoot on the move. Jump over your enemies. Leap away from danger.
Description.zh: 移动射击，跃过敌人，远离危险。

Description.en: Slow your enemies. Freeze them in place. Don't let them reach you.
Description.zh: 减速敌人，将其冻结，不留近身之机。

Description.en: Close in for the kill, then cover your retreat with a hail of spears. Don't let your enemies catch you.
Description.zh: 近战克敌制胜，立起枪阵掩护撤退，不给对手可乘之机。

Description.en: Blind them, bleed them, maim them. Prevail at any cost.
Description.zh: 致盲、流血和瘫痪，不惜代价争取胜利。

Description.en: Harness the ferocity of the wilds. Tame beasts and whip up storms.
Description.zh: 驾驭荒野的凶悍之力，驯服野兽并掀起风暴。

Description.en: Hit hard. Slam your mace on the ground. Crack the earth.
Description.zh: 倾尽全力，重锤砸向地面，引得地裂天崩。

Description.en: Stun your enemies. Push them back. Knock them to the ground.
Description.zh: 击晕敌人，将其逼退，甚至砸倒在地。

Description.en: Shrug off small hits with heavy armour. Block big attacks with your shield. Use your large life pool to absorb the rest.
Description.zh: 重甲令小刮小蹭不值一提，坚盾可直面重击而面不改色，庞大的生命池足以背负一切。

Description.en: Create large explosions. Set your enemies on fire. Watch them burn.
Description.zh: 引燃爆炸，点燃敌人，让他们陷入火海。

Description.en: Slow your enemies down. Freeze them in place. Control their movement.
Description.zh: 减速敌人，将其冻结，限制他们的移动。

Description.en: Bounce lightning around your foes. Shock them for even higher damage.
Description.zh: 让闪电在敌人之间来回弹射，通过感电造成高额伤害。

Description.en: Send forth armies of the dead. Command them to do your bidding.
Description.zh: 复活无尽大军，自由发号施令。

Description.en: Let loose plague and withering afflictions. A slow but painful death.
Description.zh: 散播瘟疫和凋零等异常，带来缓慢而痛苦的结局。

Description.en: Spikes of bone grow at your command. A fast and deadly magic.
Description.zh: 任你掌控的尖刺，迅速致命的魔法。

Description.en: Overwhelm them with a ceaseless flurry of blows. Don't let up.
Description.zh: 施展无休无止的凌厉攻势，令对手难以招架。

Description.en: Weave through hordes. Dodge out of danger. Close in for the kill.
Description.zh: 来去如风，闪转腾挪，近身克敌。

Description.en: Build up power before unleashing devastating finishers.
Description.zh: 厚积薄发，使出势大力沉的终极技。

Description.en: Switch between varied crossbow ammunition. Adapt to enemy behaviour. Exploit their weaknesses.
Description.zh: 切换花样百出的战弩弹药，根据敌人的状况灵活应变，利用他们暴露的弱点。

Description.en: Use cold to freeze them. Use fire rounds to set them aflame. Unleash cascading lightning bolts.
Description.zh: 以冰霜之力冻结敌人，用烈火弹药将其点燃，再倾泻闪电弩箭予以痛击。

Description.en: Adapt to enemy behaviour. Pick them off from afar. Destroy any that get close.
Description.zh: 根据敌人的状况灵活应变，从远处各个击破，令他们不敢近身。

Description.en: Crush your enemies as a Bear. Tear them to pieces as a Werewolf. Incinerate them as a Wyvern.
Description.zh: 变形为巨熊碾碎敌人；变形为狼人撕碎敌人；变形为双足飞龙将敌人焚灭殆尽。

Description.en: The wrath of the earth is not easily stilled. The storming sky and fractured earth will not relent until your foes are dust.
Description.zh: 大地之怒，不会轻易止息。风暴笼罩的天空与崩裂的大地，只有敌人化作尘埃，才会罢休。

Description.en: The full might of the wilds is yours to command as you see fit. Wing and claw, fire and stone, root and vine — the choice is yours.
Description.zh: 荒野的全部力量，都任你随心驱使。飞翼与利爪，火焰与岩石，根须与藤蔓——选择权在你手中。
